source:
%%sql
CREATE OR REPLACE  VIEW vw_Appeal_Service_User_curated_mipins 
AS
SELECT
    id
    ,caseReference
    ,salutation
    ,FirstName
    ,lastName
    ,addressLine1
    ,addressLine2
    ,addressTown
    ,addressCounty
    ,postcode
    ,addressCountry
    ,organisation
    ,organisationType
    ,role
    ,telephoneNumber
    ,otherPhoneNumber
    ,faxNumber
    ,emailAddress
    ,webAddress
    ,serviceUserType
    ,sourceSystem
    ,sourceSUID
    ,ODTSourceSystem
    ,ingestionDate
    ,NULLIF(ValidTo,'') as ValidTo
    ,RowID
    ,IsActive

FROM
    odw_harmonised_db.sb_service_user
    Where  (ingestionDate IS NULL OR ingestionDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
    AND     (validTo IS NULL OR validTo >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))

    union

    SELECT
    id
    ,caseReference
    ,salutation
    ,FirstName
    ,lastName
    ,addressLine1
    ,addressLine2
    ,addressTown
    ,addressCounty
    ,postcode
    ,addressCountry
    ,organisation
    ,organisationType
    ,role
    ,telephoneNumber
    ,otherPhoneNumber
    ,faxNumber
    ,emailAddress
    ,webAddress
    ,serviceUserType
    ,sourceSystem
    ,sourceSUID
    ,ODTSourceSystem
    ,ingestionDate
    ,ValidTo
    ,RowID
    ,IsActive

FROM
    odw_harmonised_db.service_user
        Where  (ingestionDate IS NULL OR ingestionDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
    AND     (validTo IS NULL OR validTo >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession

spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()

table_name = "odw_curated_db.appeal_service_user_curated_mipins"

# Get existing external table location
df_table_path = spark.sql(f"DESCRIBE EXTENDED {table_name}")

table_path = (
    df_table_path
        .filter("col_name = 'Location'")
        .select("data_type")
        .collect()[0][0]
)

# Read data from view
df = spark.sql("""
   SELECT
    id
    ,caseReference
    ,salutation
    ,FirstName
    ,lastName
    ,addressLine1
    ,addressLine2
    ,addressTown
    ,addressCounty
    ,postcode
    ,addressCountry
    ,organisation
    ,organisationType
    ,role
    ,telephoneNumber
    ,otherPhoneNumber
    ,faxNumber
    ,emailAddress
    ,webAddress
    ,serviceUserType
    ,sourceSystem
    ,sourceSUID
    ,ODTSourceSystem
    ,ingestionDate
    ,ValidTo
    ,RowID
    ,IsActive
    
FROM 
    vw_Appeal_Service_User_curated_mipins
    """)

# Overwrite Delta data at the existing table location
(
    df.write
        .format("delta")
        .mode("overwrite")
        .option("path", table_path)
        .saveAsTable(table_name)
